div.p: Five-step cycle: Forward → Loss → Backward → Step → Zero

g.text: ✓ Graph rebuilt fresh each forward pass
✓ Loss must be computed BEFORE zero_grad

div.p: Input: L.grad = 1.0 Output: p.grad for all params
Input: p.data, p.grad Output: Updated p.data
SGD Update: p_new = p_old - η · ∂L/∂p Where:
